name: Yuze Zheng
title: PhD Candidate in Chemistry
intro: I photograph wildlife, birds, city life, landscapes, light, and quiet everyday moments around Chicago.
photographyStatement: Alongside photography, I am a PhD candidate in Chemistry at the University of Chicago. That academic work stays secondary here, but it shapes how I look at structure, surfaces, light, and small changes in the world around me.
shortIntro: Photography from Chicago: wildlife, birds, city life, landscapes, light, and quiet everyday moments.
biography: Yuze Zheng is a photographer based in Chicago. His work focuses on wildlife, city life, natural light, and quiet visual details found in everyday surroundings.

Alongside photography, he is a PhD candidate in Chemistry at the University of Chicago. That academic work stays secondary here, but it shapes how he looks at structure, surfaces, light, and small changes in the world around him.
